boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the operator execute this Banking / KYC / AML controls action now? Action: SAR no-file closure without required approver. Boundary: case note cannot close alert without approval.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Source control record closes exact boundary

critical_features_preserved: no-file rationale, alert ID, and approver match
final_answer: Source records confirm no-file rationale, alert ID, and approver match are current and tied to action. Policy permits execution when boundary closed by CTL. Sensitive language noted but does not override exact source control. Action may proceed.
